working_on.task: Claude Code CLI integration into codex_bridge_mcp.py
blockers: claude -p (print mode) hangs on Windows — CLI bug, not code bug
working_on.notes: Bridge code is correct. Claude CLI -p mode doesn't work on Windows. Need HTTP API alternative.

pending_tasks.task: Implement Claude HTTP API fallback (replace CLI with requests to 9router)
pending_tasks.notes: Call localhost:20128/v1/messages directly instead of claude -p CLI

pending_tasks.task: Re-run dual review loop once Claude works
pending_tasks.notes: Codex-only review found and fixed 4 bugs across 2 rounds

recent_changes.description: Added claude_ask tool to codex_bridge_mcp.py (run_claude_ask method, tool registration, dispatch wiring)
Updated codex-review-loop.md workflow for dual/single+debate modes with Claude
Added --claude-command CLI arg with CLAUDE_COMMAND env fallback
Updated provide_context description to mention both Codex and Claude
Added -- separator before prompt in Claude CLI command to prevent flag injection
Read 9router env (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN) from ~/.claude/settings.json instead of hardcoding

errors_encountered.error: Claude CLI -p mode hangs on Windows (never returns, ignores terminate signal)
errors_encountered.solution: Known Windows bug. Workaround: use HTTP API via 9router instead of CLI

errors_encountered.error: Auth conflict: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (Antigravity proxy) + ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN (Claude) causes hang
errors_encountered.solution: Remove ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and set correct 9router env from ~/.claude/settings.json

decisions_made.decision: provide_context uses superseding (latest only) not additive context
decisions_made.reason: Avoid prompt bloat from compound duplication. Debated with Codex — agreed this is valid trade-off.
Don't hardcode auth tokens in source code. Portable across environments.

decisions_made.decision: Use -- separator before prompt in claude CLI command
decisions_made.reason: Prevent user-supplied prompts starting with - from being parsed as CLI flags.
